title: Ubiquiti E7-Audience - UniFi Enterprise E7 Audience UniFi Access Point
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise 7 Audience is a device from the Enterprise series , designed for enterprise environments The UniFi E7 Audience wireless access point features two Ethernet ports, both supporting POE++ input power (1x GE + 1x 10GE) . With support for the 802.11be (WiFi 7) standard and dual-band WiFi 5 + 6 GHz , it offers a total modulation rate of up to 20.1 Gbps * . The adjustable antenna with Beamforming support achieves a gain of 15dBi with a 50° beam angle or 10dBi with a 90° beam angle, allowing for optimized signal coverage. This makes it ideal for high-density indoor installations, such as… * Maximum modulation rate may vary depending on local regulatory conditions Supports up to 1500+ connected devices Dual-Band WiFi 7 1x GE + 1x 10GE (both POE-enabled) for high-availability installations Wireless Mesh, Fast Roaming, Band Steering Real-time spectral analysis Hotspot 2.0 Radius over TLS support UniFi Network Server version .9.2.87 or newer is required to manage the AP UniFi devices are centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server application. The downloadable application is available for Windows / Linux / MAC OS, or a standalone hardware controller can be purchased. The application is also included in selected UniFi routers Device Wall / pole mount Mounting kit
